{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20775_1
|class_id=20775
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20775_2
|fame=16
|art=17
|fth=29
|civ=11
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Partner you have, Snail HP +10<br>Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +1<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +1<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +1<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per Partner you have, Snail HP +20<br>Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +2<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +2<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
